testcase.name: gSender UI Load Test should load gSender UI with refresh on failure

testcase.name: Device Connection should connect to CNC machine by selecting the first available port
testcase.classname: should connect to CNC machine by selecting the first available port

testcase.name: Load file testing in grblHal Complete workflow: Connect-> Upload-> Disconnect->Upload-> Connect->Disconnect
